scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[field3]:5075;transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Max-Breadth: 60 P-Conference: OutdialPrompt=false, FeedbackPrompts=false Session-Expires: 4800;refresher=uac Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE P-Asserted-Identity: "Bovet1, Laurent" <sip:+41223720004@hcuge.ch> Min-SE: 4800 History-Info: <sip:9630583011059@hcuge.ch>;index=1 History-Info: "9630583011059" <sip:9630583011059@hcuge.ch>;index=1.1 Accept-Language: fr Contact: <sip:[field0]@10.133.39.158:[local_port];transport=[transport];maddr=129.195.230.15;gsid=042f5390-5517-11e9-96f5-00505681e325;epv=%3Csips:20004%40hcuge.ch%3Bgr%3D8de102924c3484bf3e0f77f65f377535%3E> Supported: 100rel, histinfo, join, replaces, sdp-anat, timer Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: Avaya one-X Communicator/6.2.13.1 (Engine GA-2.2.0.178; Windows NT Server 6.2, 64-bit) AVAYA-SM-7.1.3.3.713307 Avaya CM/R017x.01.0.532.0 AVAYA-SM-7.1.3.3.713307 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Record-Route: <sip:10.133.39.159:5060;ipcs-line=31806;lr;transport=tcp> Record-Route: <sip:SM1_New@129.195.230.17:5080;transport=tcp;lr;av-asset-uid=35422b6a> Record-Route: <sip:127.0.0.2:15060;transport=tcp;ibmsid=local.1551831406309_208203610_246364588;lr;ibmdrr> Record-Route: <sips:127.0.0.2:15061;ibmsid=local.1551831406309_208203610_246364588;lr;ibmdrr> Record-Route: <sip:SM1_New@129.195.230.17:6360;transport=tls;lr;av-asset-uid=35422b6a> Record-Route: <sip:129.195.230.15:6360;transport=tls;lr> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000

PRACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 2 PRACK Contact: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=TCP Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Rack: 62212 1 INVITE Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Length: 0

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field0]@[field2];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port][peer_tag_param] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
SIP/2.0 200 OK [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] [last_CSeq:] Contact: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: 0
